# Geo country scalar (json payload parse)

**Dataset**: `gx_04_raw_json` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Parse JSON-in-text payload fields with json_extract_scalar / json_extract_array. Geo country scalar. `json_extract_scalar()` pulls a scalar out of a JSON-in-text column (returns a string — wrap with `to_number` for math).

```sql
dataset = gx_04_raw_json | alter country = json_extract_scalar(payload, "$.geo.country") | fields src, country | limit 20
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 9). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
